variants.label: Reckless Full SIMD
variants.note: v60 full-size NNUE with integrated wasm simd128 backend; preferred default when supported.

variants.label: Reckless Full Relaxed SIMD experimental
variants.note: v60 full-size NNUE with wasm relaxed-simd enabled for selected relaxed FP ops; experimental until parity and browser benchmark results are proven.
